sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3592" key="a)kro/nhon" type="gloss" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκρό-νηον·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὸ τῆς νεὼς ἄκρον</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </entryFree>
